languages.text: "Ош-ш-ибка. За-прашш-иваемый иденти-фи-кха-тор не рас... х-х-х... позна... В-кх-ла-де-лец н-не на-зна-чен. Кх-х-х... При-кх-сту-паю к консер... х-х-х... вации". {n}Серворчереп замолкает и больше не реагирует на команды.{/n}

"Err-or. Requessst-ed des-igna-ttion not re... kh-kh-kh... cog-nised. Own-er not as-signed. Kh-kh-kh... Com-mencing con-ser... kh-kh-kh... va-tion." {n}The servo-skull falls silent and no longer responds to commands.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Ош-ш-ибка. За-прашш-иваемый иденти-фи-кха-тор не рас... х-х-х... позна... В-кх-ла-де-лец н-не на-зна-чен. Кх-х-х... При-кх-сту-паю к консер... х-х-х... вации". {n}Серворчереп замолкает и больше не реагирует на команды.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Err-ror. Request-ed ident-ti-fic-ator not re... kh-kh-kh... cog-nised. Own-ner not as-signed. Kh-kh-kh... Khom-mencing con-ser... kh-kh-kh... va-tion." {n}The servo-skull falls silent and no longer responds to commands.{/n}

"Err-ror. Request-ed ident-ti-fic-ator not re... kh-kh-kh... cog-nised. Own-ner not as-signed. Kh-kh-kh... Khom-mencing con-ser... kh-kh-kh... va-tion." {n}The servo-skull falls silent and no longer responds to commands.{/n}

"Err-or. Requessst-ed des-igna-ttion not re... kh-kh-kh... cog-nised. Own-er not as-signed. Kh-kh-kh... Com-mencing con-ser... kh-kh-kh... va-tion." {n}The servo-skull falls silent and no longer responds to commands.{/n}

languages.text: «E-rror. I-denti-fi-cación soli-ci-tada no re...kh-kh-kh... cono-cida. Pro-pieta-rio no asig-nado. Kh-kh-kh... Co-menzando con-ser... kh-kh-kh... va-ción». {n}El servocráneo guarda silencio y ya no responde a órdenes.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Err-or. Request-ed iden-ti-fic-ation not re... kh-kh-kh... cog-nised. Own-er not as-signed. Kh-kh-kh... Com-mencing con-ser... kh-kh-kh... va-tion." {n}The servo-skull falls silent and no longer responds to commands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «E-rror. I-denti-fi-cación soli-ci-tada no re...kh-kh-kh... cono-cida. Pro-pieta-rio no asig-nado. Kh-kh-kh... Co-menzando con-ser... kh-kh-kh... va-ción». {n}El servocráneo guarda silencio y ya no responde a órdenes.{/n}

languages.text: « E-rreur. Iden-ti-fic-ation non re... co-nnue. Pro-priétaire non {mf|as-signé|as-signée}. Kh-kh-kh... Lan-cement pro-cessus con-ser... kh-kh-kh... va-tion. » {n}Le servocrâne s'enferme dans le silence et ne répond plus à la moindre commande.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Err-or. Requessst-ed des-igna-ttion not re... kh-kh-kh... cog-nised. Own-er not as-signed. Kh-kh-kh... Com-mencing con-ser... kh-kh-kh... va-tion." {n}The servo-skull falls silent and no longer responds to commands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « E-rreur. Iden-ti-fic-ation non re... co-nnue. Pro-priétaire non {mf|as-signé|as-signée}. Kh-kh-kh... Lan-cement pro-cessus con-ser... kh-kh-kh... va-tion. » {n}Le servocrâne s'enferme dans le silence et ne répond plus à la moindre commande.{/n}

languages.text: “错——误。请求身——份未……咔咔……识——别。主——人未指——定。咔咔……开始保……咔咔……存。”{n}伺服头骨陷入沉默，不再响应指令。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Err-or. Requessst-ed des-igna-ttion not re... kh-kh-kh... cog-nised. Own-er not as-signed. Kh-kh-kh... Com-mencing con-ser... kh-kh-kh... va-tion." {n}The servo-skull falls silent and no longer responds to commands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “错——误。请求身——份未……咔咔……识——别。主——人未指——定。咔咔……开始保……咔咔……存。”{n}伺服头骨陷入沉默，不再响应指令。{/n}

languages.text: Feh-ler. Angeforder-te Iden-ti-fi-kation nicht er ... kh-kh-kh ... kannt. Kein Besitzer zugewiesen. Kh-kh-kh ... Be-ginne mit Kon-ser... kh-kh-kh ...vierung. {n}Der Servoschädel verstummt und reagiert nicht mehr auf Befehle.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Err-or. Requessst-ed des-igna-ttion not re... kh-kh-kh... cog-nised. Own-er not as-signed. Kh-kh-kh... Com-mencing con-ser... kh-kh-kh... va-tion." {n}The servo-skull falls silent and no longer responds to commands.{/n}

languages.text: "Ha...Ta. Ta...Lep edi... Len kim... Lik ta... Nın... Hı hı hı... Ma... Dı. Sa... Hip atan... Ma... Dı. Hı hı hı... Ko... Ru... Ma... Hı hı hı... Baş... La... Tı... Lı... Yor." {n}Hizmelet sessizliğe gömülüp artık komutlara yanıt vermiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Err-or. Request-ed iden-ti-fic-ation not re... kh-kh-kh... cog-nised. Own-er not as-signed. Kh-kh-kh... Com-mencing con-ser... kh-kh-kh... va-tion." {n}The servo-skull falls silent and no longer responds to commands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ha...Ta. Ta...Lep edi... Len kim... Lik ta... Nın... Hı hı hı... Ma... Dı. Sa... Hip atan... Ma... Dı. Hı hı hı... Ko... Ru... Ma... Hı hı hı... Baş... La... Tı... Lı... Yor." {n}Hizmelet sessizliğe gömülüp artık komutlara yanıt vermiyor.{/n}

languages.text: 「エ・ラー。要・請・さ・れ・た……識・別……カッ、カッ、カッ……認・識・さ・れ・ず。所・有・者……未・割・り・当・て。カッ、カッ、カッ……保・存・を……カッ、カッ、カッ……開・始」{n}サーヴォスカルは沈黙し、もはや命令に応じなくなる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Err-or. Requessst-ed des-igna-ttion not re... kh-kh-kh... cog-nised. Own-er not as-signed. Kh-kh-kh... Com-mencing con-ser... kh-kh-kh... va-tion." {n}The servo-skull falls silent and no longer responds to commands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「エ・ラー。要・請・さ・れ・た……識・別……カッ、カッ、カッ……認・識・さ・れ・ず。所・有・者……未・割・り・当・て。カッ、カッ、カッ……保・存・を……カッ、カッ、カッ……開・始」{n}サーヴォスカルは沈黙し、もはや命令に応じなくなる。{/n}
